testcase.name: Verify profile fields display correctly and are non-editable
testcase.system-out: First Name value: "Jahanzaib" First Name is non-editable ✅ Last Name value: "Xenex" Last Name is non-editable ✅ Email value: "jahanzaib.xenex@gmail.com" Email is non-editable ✅ Mobile Number not visible or does not exist Telephone value: "Telephone" Telephone is non-editable ✅ Job Title value: "EMPTY" Job Title is non-editable ✅ Biography value: "EMPTY" Biography is non-editable ✅ Role value: "Operations Manager" Role is non-editable ✅ Group value: "EMPTY" Group is non-editable ✅ Office value: "QA Tester" Office is non-editable ✅
